notes: Batch-C: 30 bilingual_search_terms entries (17 features_page + 13 appearance_page). Strategy: preserve original English verbatim, append single space, then space-separated Chinese keywords mirroring the English semantics. Discovered each widget's UI purpose via grep of `fn search_terms` in source. Notes: (1) For `text thin strokes high dpi` deliberately dropped the standalone 'dpi' Chinese rendering — translated to '高分辨率' which conveys the dpi concept; the english 'dpi' literal remains intact for direct query. (2) `ctrl tab` translated only the trailing concepts (行为/窗格/...), since 'ctrl' and 'tab' are keyboard literals users will type in English. (3) 'agent' / 'oz' / 'third-party' kept English in original portion and reflected in zh as '提示栏' / 第三方 where the Chinese semantic differs (oz is brand — no zh equivalent; covered by original literal). (4) No punctuation, no duplicates, lowercase preserved for any Latin tokens since the matcher does `.to_lowercase()`. (5) Verified all original english is preserved verbatim in each target.
